name: Amaretto Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 10-inch springform pan (greased and lined with parchment)
cookie sheet (greased and lined with parchment)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Prepare the hazelnut crust by combining roasted hazelnuts, egg whites, vanilla extract, powdered sugar, granulated sugar, and salt in a food processor until smooth.
3. Pour half of the batter into the prepared springform pan and spread it evenly. Set aside the remaining batter for later use.
4. Line a cookie sheet with parchment paper.
5. Process the reserved batter on the cookie sheet until smooth, then pour onto the prepared cookie sheet and spread into an 7-8 inch disk.
6. Bake the crust for 25-30 minutes (or until set). Let cool on a wire rack.
7. Chop the cooled disk into small pieces and soak in amaretto for 1/2 to 1 cup, stirring occasionally but not exceeding 15 minutes.
8. To make the filling, sprinkle gelatin over 1/4 cup amaretto and let stand for 5 minutes. Warm the mixture in a saucepan with hot water, stirring until dissolved. Keep warm.
9. Beat cream cheese until smooth, then add lemon juice, zest, and beat until soft peaks form. Gradually fold in 1/3 of the whipped cream into the cream cheese mixture, then fold in the remaining whipped cream and soaked macaroon bits.
10. Pour the filling into the prepared pan and cover with plastic wrap.
11. Refrigerate for at least 3 hours or overnight before serving.
